name: markitdown
description: Browser extension to render Markdown files — TypeScript source, Rollup bundle, Chromium and Firefox builds

scripts.build:chromium: BROWSER=chromium rollup -c && cp -r icons styles dist/chromium/ && cp build/manifest.chromium.json dist/chromium/manifest.json
scripts.build:firefox: BROWSER=firefox rollup -c && cp -r icons styles dist/firefox/ && cp build/manifest.firefox.json dist/firefox/manifest.json
scripts.build:all: rollup -c && cp -r icons styles dist/chromium/ && cp build/manifest.chromium.json dist/chromium/manifest.json && cp -r icons styles dist/firefox/ && cp build/manifest.firefox.json dist/firefox/manifest.json
scripts.package:chromium: npm run build:chromium && cd dist/chromium && zip -r ../../markitdown-$npm_package_version-chromium.zip .
scripts.package:firefox: npm run build:firefox && cd dist/firefox && zip -r ../../markitdown-$npm_package_version-firefox.zip .
scripts.package:all: npm run clean && npm run package:chromium && npm run package:firefox
